PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetCollectionImpl(COLLECTION)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('File')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetCollectRHandImpl(COLLECT_R_HAND)
      PsiElement(<|)('<|')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetCollectionStatementImpl(COLLECTION_STATEMENT)
        PsiPuppetCollExprImpl(COLL_EXPR)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('tag')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(==)('==')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''base::linux'')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(|>)('|>')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedAnyArgumentsListBlockImpl(BRACED_ANY_ARGUMENTS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
        PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('owner')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(=>)('=>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''root'')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('group')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(+>)('+>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''root'')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('mode')
          PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
          PsiElement(=>)('=>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
            PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('0640')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetCollectionImpl(COLLECTION)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('User')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetCollectRHandImpl(COLLECT_R_HAND)
      PsiElement(<|)('<|')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetCollectionStatementImpl(COLLECTION_STATEMENT)
        PsiPuppetCollExprImpl(COLL_EXPR)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('title')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(==)('==')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''luke'')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(|>)('|>')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetCollectionImpl(COLLECTION)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('User')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetCollectRHandImpl(COLLECT_R_HAND)
      PsiElement(<|)('<|')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetCollectionStatementImpl(COLLECTION_STATEMENT)
        PsiPuppetCollExprImpl(COLL_EXPR)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('groups')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(==)('==')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''admin'')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(|>)('|>')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetCollectionImpl(COLLECTION)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('User')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetCollectRHandImpl(COLLECT_R_HAND)
      PsiElement(<|)('<|')
      PsiElement(|>)('|>')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetCollectionImpl(COLLECTION)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('User')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetCollectRHandImpl(COLLECT_R_HAND)
      PsiElement(<<|)('<<|')
      PsiElement(|>>)('|>>')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetCollectionImpl(COLLECTION)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('User')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetCollectRHandImpl(COLLECT_R_HAND)
      PsiElement(<|)('<|')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetCollectionStatementImpl(COLLECTION_STATEMENT)
        PsiPuppetCollExprImpl(COLL_EXPR)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('title')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(==)('==')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetExpressionCompImpl(EXPRESSION_COMP)
            PsiPuppetExpressionBinaryImpl(EXPRESSION_BINARY)
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''luke'')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement(and)('and')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('groups')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(!=)('!=')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''admin'')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(|>)('|>')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetCollectionImpl(COLLECTION)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('User')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetCollectRHandImpl(COLLECT_R_HAND)
      PsiElement(<|)('<|')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetCollectionStatementImpl(COLLECTION_STATEMENT)
        PsiPuppetCollExprImpl(COLL_EXPR)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('title')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(==)('==')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetExpressionCompImpl(EXPRESSION_COMP)
            PsiPuppetExpressionBinaryImpl(EXPRESSION_BINARY)
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''luke'')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement(or)('or')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('groups')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(!=)('!=')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''admin'')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(|>)('|>')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetCollectionImpl(COLLECTION)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('User')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetCollectRHandImpl(COLLECT_R_HAND)
      PsiElement(<|)('<|')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetCollectionStatementImpl(COLLECTION_STATEMENT)
        PsiPuppetCollExprImpl(COLL_EXPR)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('title')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(==)('==')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetExpressionBinaryImpl(EXPRESSION_BINARY)
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''luke'')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(or)('or')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetExpressionParenImpl(EXPRESSION_PAREN)
              PsiElement(()('(')
              PsiPuppetExpressionCompImpl(EXPRESSION_COMP)
                PsiPuppetExpressionCompImpl(EXPRESSION_COMP)
                  Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                    PsiElement($)('$')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('groups')
                  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                  PsiElement(!=)('!=')
                  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                  PsiPuppetExpressionBinaryImpl(EXPRESSION_BINARY)
                    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                      PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''admin'')
                    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                    PsiElement(and)('and')
                    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                      PsiElement(NAME)('groups')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiElement(!=)('!=')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetExpressionAdditiveImpl(EXPRESSION_ADDITIVE)
                  PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                    PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''wheel'')
                  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                  PsiElement(+)('+')
                  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                  PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
                    PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
              PsiElement())(')')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(|>)('|>')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetCollectionImpl(COLLECTION)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('User')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetCollectRHandImpl(COLLECT_R_HAND)
      PsiElement(<<|)('<<|')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetCollectionStatementImpl(COLLECTION_STATEMENT)
        PsiPuppetCollExprImpl(COLL_EXPR)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('title')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(==)('==')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetExpressionBinaryImpl(EXPRESSION_BINARY)
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''luke'')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(or)('or')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetExpressionParenImpl(EXPRESSION_PAREN)
              PsiElement(()('(')
              PsiPuppetExpressionCompImpl(EXPRESSION_COMP)
                PsiPuppetExpressionCompImpl(EXPRESSION_COMP)
                  Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                    PsiElement($)('$')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('groups')
                  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                  PsiElement(!=)('!=')
                  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                  PsiPuppetExpressionBinaryImpl(EXPRESSION_BINARY)
                    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                      PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''admin'')
                    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                    PsiElement(and)('and')
                    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                      PsiElement(NAME)('groups')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiElement(!=)('!=')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetExpressionAdditiveImpl(EXPRESSION_ADDITIVE)
                  PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                    PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''wheel'')
                  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                  PsiElement(+)('+')
                  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                  PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
                    PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('2')
              PsiElement())(')')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(|>>)('|>>')
